decisions.rationale: Valid layering asymmetry: saveJournalEntryReflection tries uds_journalentry then onboarding_data sidecar, skipping a journal_entries middle tier that updateJournalEntry uses. However coverage preflight documents this data_fallback intentionally; fetchJournalEntries on the journal_entries path does not select ai_reflection_text and merges reflections via applyReflectionFallback from onboarding_data — so the prototype table path already relies on the sidecar for reflection text. Primary AC-2/AC-3 path (uds_journalentry) persists and renders ai_reflection_text correctly; criteria_audit and functional_audit FV-4 pass. No downstream item depends_on JOURNAL-04 for journal_entries column parity. Defer to a journal API layering hardening wave (add trySaveReflectionInJournalEntriesTable when schema gains the column, mirroring updateJournalEntry).

IR re-read: ai_RNbBHXlb (entry-delete-confirm-text) is in the expanded subtree but not a named JOURNAL-04 ui_ref; decompose ACs and ui_evidence gate on ai_RNbBHXla delete-confirm-section and ai_RNbBHXle delete CTA, both pass. Delete copy was not cross-checked against IR presentation.text in this review pass — a valid polish gap, not a criteria_audit fail. shadcn Dialog overlay/stacking vs Bubble z-index groups is the same brownfield equivalence pattern deferred on JOURNAL-03-new-entry-popup (C-1 dialog-shell polish). Low priority; functional delete-confirm flow (FV-3) passes. Defer copy alignment for ai_RNbBHXlb and module-wide dialog overlay notes to journal popup polish wave.

Code confirms deleteJournalEntry returns early on successful uds_journalentry delete without pruning JOURNAL_REFLECTIONS_ONBOARDING_KEY, while journal_entries and pure onboarding_data delete paths do prune orphaned reflection keys. Valid stale-data edge case when reflections were previously stored in the sidecar fallback and the entry is later removed via uds. Does not violate AC-2 (row removal succeeds), does not affect list UI after delete, and is not cited in scope or ACs. Low-priority data hygiene suitable for a later journal API cleanup pass alongside C-1 layering work.

summary: Review passed at 100% coverage with 0 blockers. Triage: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Deferred: C-1 → journal API layering hardening (journal_entries ai_reflection_text path when schema supports it); C-2 → journal popup polish (ai_RNbBHXlb copy verification, Dialog overlay equivalence); C-3 → journal API cleanup (prune onboarding reflection keys on uds delete). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
